themeWords.meaning: The personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD.

sentenceTheme: Israel testifies that the LORD defended them from overwhelming enemies; our help is in His name.

verses.text: If it had not been the LORD who was on our side, now may Israel say;

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD.
Israel; the name of Jacob and the nation descended from him.

verses.text: If it had not been the LORD who was on our side, when men rose up against us:

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD.

verses.text: Then they had swallowed us up quick, when their wrath was kindled against us:

highlightedWords.meaning: Anger, wrath (lit. nose, nostrils as a figure for anger).

verses.text: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul:
Then the proud waters had gone over our soul.
Blessed be the LORD, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth.

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD.
Prey, torn meat; that which is seized by a predator.

verses.text: Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers: the snare is broken, and we are escaped.

highlightedWords.meaning: A snare or trap, especially for birds.
To escape, slip away, be delivered.

verses.text: Our help is in the name of the LORD, who made heaven and earth.

highlightedWords.meaning: The personal name of Israel’s God; the LORD.
